/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gimbal_serial_unittest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/gimbal_serial_unittest.dir/gimbal_serial_unittest.cc.o CMakeFiles/gimbal_serial_unittest.dir/__/__/main/io/gimbal_serial.c.o CMakeFiles/gimbal_serial_unittest.dir/__/__/main/drivers/gimbal_common.c.o CMakeFiles/gimbal_serial_unittest.dir/__/__/main/common/maths.c.o CMakeFiles/gimbal_serial_unittest.dir/__/__/main/drivers/headtracker_common.c.o CMakeFiles/gimbal_serial_unittest.dir/gimbal_serial_unittest_gen/settings_generated.c.o -o gimbal_serial_unittest  ../../../lib/libgtest_main.a ../../../lib/libgtest.a
